Qualified Orders Filled in 10-Seconds or Less - or They're Free!

Time is money. Nowhere is that more true than in executing your stock trades. Because in just a second, the price you thought you had can change. And that can cost you money. That's why we're introducing the Ameritrade 10-Second Guarantee. 

That's right! With the Ameritrade 10-Second Guarantee, qualifying S&P 100
 Internet equity market trades that take longer than 10 seconds to execute are commission-free! (some limitations apply)*

How can we guarantee such speed? Our proprietary order routing system lets us dynamically distribute orders to multiple market centers to seek best execution. This routing system gives you a premium combination of speed, price and liquidity that has enabled us to receive execution on 99.5% of our trades at or within the National Best Bid and Offer.** 

Learn more about our 10-Second Guarantee <http://ameritrade.cq0.net/r/default.asp?R=000088d5700004e33&a=wfv&p=/html/best2%2Efhtml> and our proprietary order routing system. 

You deserve the best combination of speed, price, and access to liquidity from your broker. With Ameritrade you can rest assured that's what you get!
